UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user of the AISleek application, holding personal and account-level information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for contact and identification.

name.description: The user's display name or full name.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

AIProductOffering.title: AIProductOffering
AIProductOffering.description: Represents a specific AI model or product offering provided by an AI vendor, detailing its characteristics and base pricing.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AIProductOffering entity.

name.description: The common name of the AI product or model (e.g., 'GPT-4o', 'Claude 3 Opus', 'Gemini 1.5 Pro').

providerName.description: The name of the AI service provider (e.g., 'OpenAI', 'Anthropic', 'Google').

description.description: A brief description of the AI product offering, its capabilities, and ideal use cases.

inputCostPerToken.description: The cost per token for input (prompt) data, used for calculating API usage costs.

outputCostPerToken.description: The cost per token for output (response) data, used for calculating API usage costs.

typicalLatencyMs.description: The average latency in milliseconds for typical API calls to this model, for performance comparisons.

capabilities.description: A list of key capabilities supported by this AI model (e.g., 'text_generation', 'image_analysis', 'code_generation').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this AI product offering was first added to the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the details of this AI product offering were last updated.

AISubscription.title: AISubscription
AISubscription.description: Represents a user's active subscription or access to a specific AI product offering, including personalized settings and costs.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AISubscription entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity that owns this subscription. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N AISubscription)

aiProductOfferingId.description: Reference to the AIProductOffering entity that this subscription is for. (Relationship: AIProductOffering 1:N AISubscription)

customName.description: A user-defined name for this specific subscription instance (e.g., 'My Dev GPT-4o API Key', 'Marketing Team Claude Access').

subscriptionType.description: The type of subscription or access mechanism (e.g., 'API Key', 'Web UI Plan', 'Enterprise Tier').

monthlyFixedCost.description: The fixed monthly cost associated with this subscription plan, if any.

estimatedMonthlyUsageCost.description: The system's estimated variable monthly cost based on historical API usage for this subscription.

renewalDate.description: The date when this subscription is due for renewal or the next billing cycle.

apiEndpointUrl.description: The specific API endpoint URL for this subscription, if applicable.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the subscription is currently active.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this subscription record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this subscription record was last updated.

APIUsageRecord.title: APIUsageRecord
APIUsageRecord.description: A detailed record of a single API call made through a user's AI subscription, capturing usage and cost metrics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the APIUsageRecord entity.

aiSubscriptionId.description: Reference to the AISubscription entity this usage record pertains to. (Relationship: AISubscription 1:N APIUsageRecord)

timestamp.description: The exact date and time when the API call occurred.

apiCallType.description: The type of API call made (e.g., 'chat_completion', 'image_generation', 'embedding', 'text_moderation').

inputTokens.description: The number of input tokens used in this specific API call.

outputTokens.description: The number of output tokens generated by this specific API call.

cost.description: The calculated cost of this individual API call based on token usage and model pricing.

latencyMs.description: The latency of the API call in milliseconds, useful for performance analysis.

associatedTask.description: An optional user-defined string or tag to associate this API usage with a specific task, project, or feature within the user's workflow.

OptimizationSuggestion.title: OptimizationSuggestion
OptimizationSuggestion.description: A suggestion generated by the AISleek cost optimization tool, providing actionable insights for users to reduce AI spending.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OptimizationSuggestion entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity to whom this suggestion is made. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N OptimizationSuggestion)

suggestionTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the optimization suggestion was generated.

description.description: A detailed explanation of the optimization suggestion and its rationale.

potentialSavingsMonthly.description: The estimated monthly financial savings if this suggestion is adopted.

currentAISubscriptionId.description: Reference to the AISubscription entity that is the primary subject of the optimization. (Relationship: AISubscription 1:N OptimizationSuggestion)

recommendedAIProductOfferingId.description: Optional: Reference to the AIProductOffering recommended as a more cost-effective or efficient alternative, if applicable. (Relationship: AIProductOffering 1:N OptimizationSuggestion)

status.description: The current status of the suggestion (e.g., 'pending', 'applied', 'dismissed', 'archived').

appliedDate.description: Optional: Timestamp when the user marked the suggestion as applied.

ModelComparison.title: ModelComparison
ModelComparison.description: Records the results of a side-by-side comparison of AI model outputs, including quality scores and differences, for performance analysis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ModelComparison entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity that initiated this comparison. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ModelComparison)

comparisonTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the model comparison was performed.

testScenarioDescription.description: A description of the specific task or scenario for which the models were compared (e.g., 'Summarizing meeting notes', 'Generating marketing copy').

model1SubscriptionId.description: Reference to the first AISubscription entity involved in the comparison. (Relationship: AISubscription 1:N ModelComparison)

model2SubscriptionId.description: Reference to the second AISubscription entity involved in the comparison. (Relationship: AISubscription 1:N ModelComparison)

inputPrompt.description: The common input prompt or task instruction given to both models.

outputModel1.description: The output generated by the first model in response to the input prompt.

outputModel2.description: The output generated by the second model in response to the input prompt.

qualityScoreModel1.description: The assigned quality score for the first model's output (e.g., on a scale of 1-100).

qualityScoreModel2.description: The assigned quality score for the second model's output (e.g., on a scale of 1-100).

qualityDifferencePercentage.description: The percentage difference in quality score between model 1 and model 2 (positive for model 1 better, negative for model 2 better).

toleranceThresholdMet.description: Indicates whether the observed quality difference is within the user-defined acceptable tolerance threshold.

ModelSwitchSimulation.title: ModelSwitchSimulation
ModelSwitchSimulation.description: Records the details and projected outcomes of simulating a switch from one AI model subscription to another.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ModelSwitchSimulation entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity that performed this simulation. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ModelSwitchSimulation)

simulationTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the model switch simulation was performed.

currentAISubscriptionId.description: Reference to the current AISubscription entity being considered for replacement. (Relationship: AISubscription 1:N ModelSwitchSimulation)

proposedAISubscriptionId.description: Reference to the proposed AISubscription entity to switch to. (Relationship: AISubscription 1:N ModelSwitchSimulation)

projectedCostDifferenceMonthly.description: The estimated monthly cost difference if the switch is made (negative for savings, positive for increased cost).

estimatedPerformanceDeltaPercentage.description: The estimated percentage change in performance if the switch is made (positive for improvement, negative for degradation).

status.description: The current status of the simulation (e.g., 'simulated', 'approved', 'rejected', 'executed').

executedDate.description: Optional: Timestamp when the simulated switch was actually executed or scheduled.

UserBudget.title: UserBudget
UserBudget.description: Stores a user's monthly budget caps, alert thresholds, and current spending for AI tool usage.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserBudget entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity to whom this budget belongs. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N UserBudget)

monthYear.description: The specific month and year for which the budget is set (e.g., '2023-10').

monthlyBudgetCap.description: The maximum monetary amount allocated for AI tool spending for the specified month.

alertThresholdPercentage.description: The percentage of the monthly budget cap at which an alert should be triggered (e.g., 80 for 80%).

currentSpend.description: The aggregated current spend for the given month, typically calculated from APIUsageRecords.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when this budget record was last updated or refreshed.

Alert.title: Alert
Alert.description: Records notifications generated by the system for various events, such as budget thresholds being crossed or quality degradation detected.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Alert entity.

userProfileId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity to whom the alert is directed. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Alert)

alertTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the alert was generated.

alertType.description: The category or type of the alert (e.g., 'budget_threshold_exceeded', 'usage_spike_detected', 'quality_degradation_flagged', 'vendor_lock_in_risk_increased').

message.description: The descriptive message content of the alert, providing details about the event.

relatedAISubscriptionId.description: Optional: Reference to the AISubscription entity directly related to this alert, if applicable. (Relationship: AISubscription 1:N Alert)

severity.description: The severity level of the alert (e.g., 'info', 'warning', 'critical').

isRead.description: Indicates whether the user has marked the alert as read.

definition.description: Stores individual user profiles. Access is restricted to the owner matching `request.auth.uid`.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user, corresponding to `request.auth.uid`.

definition.description: Stores globally available information about various AI model offerings. This data is public/read-only for all users and managed by administrators.

params.name: offeringId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific AI product offering.

definition.description: Contains user-specific AI subscriptions. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' for authorization independence, allowing direct `resource.data.userProfileId == request.auth.uid` checks.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this subscription.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific AI subscription.

definition.description: Detailed records of API calls for a specific user's AI subscription. For authorization independence, each document *must* include a denormalized 'userProfileId' field, even though it's not explicitly in the provided schema. This enables direct ownership checks (`resource.data.userProfileId == request.auth.uid`).

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who owns this usage record.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the AI subscription this usage record belongs to.

params.name: recordId
params.description: The unique identifier for a single API usage record.

definition.description: Stores cost optimization suggestions generated for a user. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user for whom the suggestion is made.

params.name: suggestionId
params.description: The unique identifier for an optimization suggestion.

definition.description: Records user-initiated model comparisons. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who performed the comparison.

params.name: comparisonId
params.description: The unique identifier for a model comparison record.

definition.description: Stores simulations of switching between AI models for a user. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user who performed the simulation.

params.name: simulationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a model switch simulation record.

definition.description: Stores monthly budget caps and spending for a user. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user to whom this budget belongs.

params.name: budgetId
params.description: The unique identifier for a user's budget record (e.g., could be a specific month/year).

definition.description: Records system-generated alerts for a user. Includes denormalized 'userProfileId' for authorization independence.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user to whom this alert is directed.

params.name: alertId
params.description: The unique identifier for an alert.

definition.description: Dedicated collection for storing admin role assignments. Document existence determines admin status (DBAC).

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique identifier of a user who has been assigned an administrator role.
